title: webhook block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the webhook building block after dispatching an HTTP webhook or triggering a downstream GitHub workflow.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the block completed.

mode.description: Whether this block dispatched an HTTP webhook or triggered a GitHub workflow_dispatch event.

response_code.description: HTTP response code. Present only when mode is 'http'.

target_repo.description: Target repository (owner/repo). Present only when mode is 'workflow_dispatch'.

target_workflow.description: Target workflow filename or ID. Present only when mode is 'workflow_dispatch'.

release_tag.description: Release tag passed as context to the webhook or triggered workflow.
